mnemonics: DESCribe to Predict the Future Prescriptively
keyPoints: Descriptive Analytics: Summarizes past data to understand what has happened.
Predictive Analytics: Uses statistical models and forecasts to understand what could happen.
Prescriptive Analytics: Recommends actions you can take to affect desired outcomes.
commonMistakes: Confusing Descriptive Analytics (what happened) with Diagnostic Analytics (why it happened).
Assuming Predictive Analytics guarantees future outcomes rather than probabilities.
Using Prescriptive Analytics without first establishing a clear business objective.
